blockers: Field mapping is wrong: the route emits `to: payload.to ?? payload.recipient`, but worker emits payloads with the recipient under `recipient_or_key` (authoritative in shared/src/activity.ts:OutputDispatchedEventSchema). Result: every output event delivered to desktop will have `to: undefined`. Spec explicitly requires {run_id, channel, to, ...}.

output_failed payload has no recipient at all — shared/src/activity.ts OutputFailedEventSchema only defines {kind, channel, error, retriable}. The route's frame promised `to` and `subject` on failed events, which will always be undefined. The failed-event test injected synthetic payload keys that the worker never emits, masking the bug.
nits: subject is also never emitted by the worker — drop it from the SSE frame or extend the worker's payload to include it
OUTPUT_ACTIVITY_TYPES is a hand-maintained set duplicated from shared/src/activity.ts
High-volume cost note: every cloud_activity INSERT for the workspace crosses the wire and hits the JS callback before the activity_type filter rejects it
reviewer: opus-4.7 adversarial pass via Agent tool
